cannot_place_here: Cannot place here — tiles are occupied, blocked, or not unlocked
building_limit_reached: Building limit reached! Level up to unlock more.
not_enough_resources_read_more: Not enough resources! Read more to earn them.
daily_limit_reached_message: You've already logged 200 pages on {date}! That's the daily limit. Remember, cheating only hurts yourself — this is a personal journey to grow your reading habit, not a competition with others. Keep it real and enjoy the process!
daily_limit_partial_message: You can only log {allowed} more pages on {date} (daily limit: {limit}). Logging more than 200 pages per day is not typical and doesn't help you grow. Want to log {allowed} pages instead?
no_new_pages_reward_hint: No new resources — pages already logged keep their rewards even if sessions are deleted.
import_error_not_json: This file is not a valid JSON file.
import_error_invalid_file: This file is not a My Reading Village backup. Please select a valid backup file.
import_warning_body: This will replace data only for the sections included in the backup (e.g. books, village, resources). Sections not included in the export will remain untouched and will NOT be deleted. This action cannot be undone for the replaced sections.
reset_warning_body: This will permanently delete ALL your data: books, village, progress — everything. This cannot be undone!
notification_daily_body: Your village is waiting! Read a few pages today.
tour_welcome: Hi there! I'm {name}! Welcome to your very own Reading Village! I'm so happy to show you around today! ✨
tour_resources: That glowing panel above holds your resources — coins, gems, wood and metal! You earn them all by reading books. Tap the arrow to hide it or expand it! 📚
tour_highlight_missions: The missions button keeps track of all your goals and rewards!
tour_missions_explain: In your missions panel, you'll find goals to complete one by one — claim awesome rewards and watch your wonderful village grow! 🌟
tour_highlight_build: The build button opens construction mode to place and upgrade buildings!
tour_build_explain: Welcome to construction mode! Choose a building from the panel below and tap a tile to place it! Build homes, parks, schools and more! 🏠
tour_highlight_reading: The reading tracker is where you log all your reading sessions and track progress!
tour_reading_explain: In the reading tracker, you'll log every session — every page earns resources for your village! Your villagers love books too! 💕
tour_highlight_backpack: Your backpack holds special power-up items to help your village!
tour_backpack_explain: In there, you'll find items like Happiness Books to cheer up villagers and Constructor Sandwiches to double your building speed! 🎒
tour_highlight_minigames: The minigames button unlocks fun literary challenges!
tour_minigames_explain: Inside, you'll find challenges to test your book knowledge — win streaks to earn extra rewards! Can you name all the famous authors? 🎮
tour_highlight_photo: The photo button captures a beautiful snapshot of your whole village!
tour_photo_explain: In there, you can save or share a snapshot of your village to show off your wonderful village as it grows! 📸
tour_highlight_stats: Stats keeps track of all your reading progress and village growth!
tour_stats_explain: Inside, you'll see everything — pages read, books finished, reading time and your growing village! Every page counts! 📊
tour_highlight_settings: Settings is where you customize your whole experience!
tour_settings_explain: In there, you can set your username, village name, change your language, manage data and much more! Make it truly yours! ⚙️
tour_highlight_roulette: The roulette button gives you a chance to win bonus resources every day!
tour_roulette_explain: Spin the roulette once a day for free and earn surprise rewards — gems, coins, wood and more! Every spin is a brand new adventure! 🎰
tour_highlight_store: The store is where you can find special items and power-ups for your village!
tour_store_explain: In the store you'll find power-ups, collectibles and special items to make your village thrive! Spend your resources wisely, reader! 🏪
tour_highlight_species_book: The species collection keeps track of all the wonderful animal friends you have discovered!
tour_species_book_explain: Every new animal species you unlock gets added to your collection! Keep reading and leveling up to discover them all — how many can you find? 🐾
tour_input_subtitle: What's your name and your village's name?
tour_farewell: You're all set, {name}! Your adventure starts RIGHT NOW! Read every day, build your dream village, and keep your villagers happy! 🌸
roulette_not_enough_gems: Not enough gems! You need {gems} gems to spin.
edit_daily_limit_full: {date} already has {limit} pages logged (daily limit reached).
edit_daily_limit_partial: {date} only has room for {available} more pages (daily limit: {limit}).
calculator_subtitle: You've read {read} of {total} pages. Enter the page you are currently on to calculate how many pages you've read this session.
calculator_error_already_read: You've already read past this page!
glasses_desc: Earn 1.5x resources from reading for 1 hour!
glasses_snack: Magic Glasses activated! Enjoy 1.5x reading rewards for 1 hour!
store_confirm_body: This will deduct {gems} gems from your total. Continue?
store_simulation_notice: Simulation mode — no real money charged. Set playStore=true to enable real payments.
store_discount_subtitle: Limited time offer — grab it now!
store_pack_pack_village_desc: 500 coins + 200 wood + 100 metal + 100 gems + 5 sandwiches + 5 hammers
store_pack_pack_mega_desc: 1000 coins + 500 wood + 200 metal + 200 gems + 10 of every powerup
species_desc_cat: A bookish feline who loves curling up with a good story.
species_desc_dog: An eager pup always ready to fetch the next chapter.
species_desc_rabbit: A gentle soul who hops through pages with curiosity.
species_desc_koala: A dreamy reader who sips eucalyptus tea between chapters.
species_desc_raccoon: A night owl who reads by lantern light with clever paws.
species_desc_elephant: Never forgets a plot twist — the village memory keeper.
species_desc_duck: A cheerful waddler who splashes through stories with boundless enthusiasm.
species_desc_grizzly_bear: A cozy giant who hibernates only to read more books.
species_desc_pig: A cheerful bookworm who annotates every margin with joy.
species_desc_hamster: Tiny but mighty — collects books like seeds for winter.
species_desc_platypus: A wonderfully odd reader who defies every genre — part mystery, part adventure, entirely unique.
species_desc_polar_bear: A rare arctic scholar who braves blizzards for knowledge.
species_desc_red_panda: A fluffy bamboo enthusiast who reads with a curled-up tail and rosy cheeks.
species_desc_sloth: Takes things slow, but always finishes the book — patience is its superpower.
species_desc_hedgehog: A prickly little scholar who curls up with mysteries and never spoils the ending.
species_desc_capybara: The calmest reader in the village — everyone wants to sit next to this gentle giant.
species_desc_cow: A patient storyteller who moos softly through bedtime tales and morning reads.
species_desc_sheep: Counts pages instead of sheep — this woolly reader never falls asleep before the ending.
species_desc_bull: A determined reader who charges through thick volumes with unstoppable passion.
species_desc_panda_bear: An extraordinary bamboo reader with infinite patience.
species_desc_otter: A playful swimmer who floats on its back reading waterproof adventure tales.
species_desc_kangaroo: Carries a book in its pouch wherever it hops — always ready for the next chapter.
species_desc_reindeer: A festive reader who guides the village's winter story circle with glowing antlers.
species_desc_ferret: A curious wriggler who digs through stacks of books with boundless enthusiasm.
species_desc_mole: A quiet underground scholar who discovers hidden worlds through ancient tomes.
species_desc_bat: A nocturnal bookworm who reads by moonlight and dreams in stories.
species_desc_donkey: Steadfast and wise — carries the heaviest books without a single complaint.
species_desc_turkey: A grand and extraordinary reader who fans out pages like tail feathers — always making an impression.
species_desc_monkey: A legendary jungle storyteller who swings from tale to tale with boundless curiosity and charm.
species_desc_gorilla: A legendary gentle giant who reads with quiet intensity and vast wisdom.
species_desc_zebra: A legendary striped reader who sees stories in black, white, and every shade between.
species_desc_horse: A gallant reader who gallops through epic tales with grace and noble spirit.
species_desc_skunk: Surprisingly fragrant tales — this legendary reader leaves a lasting impression on every book.
species_desc_hyena: A legendary cackler who laughs through comedies and weeps through tragedies with equal joy.
species_desc_mouse: Tiny but legendary — this little reader has squeezed through more volumes than anyone can count.
species_desc_lion: A godly reader whose roar quiets the library with awe.
species_desc_armadillo: A godly armored scholar who protects ancient stories beneath a shell of quiet wisdom.
species_desc_beaver: A godly builder of knowledge who constructs towers of books with industrious devotion.
species_desc_fox: A godly cunning intellect who outwits every plot twist with a sly, knowing smile.
species_desc_tiger: A godly apex reader whose fierce passion devours entire libraries in silence.
species_desc_leopard: A godly spotted sage who leaps between genres with effortless, breathtaking grace.
species_book_unlock_store: Available in Store, Special Event or Roulette
species_book_locked_desc: Keep playing to discover this species!
roulette_species_bonus: Bonus! A new species joins your village!
roulette_species_duplicate_desc: You already have {species}! You receive {gems} gems as compensation.
species_unlocked_level: You unlocked a new species at level {level}!
